scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const domain=process.env.DOMAIN||'construmaxpiscinas.com';const home=process.env.HOME||os.homedir();const base=process.env.BASE||path.join(home,'domains',domain);const persist=process.env.PERSIST||path.join(base,'storage','uploads');const candidates=process.env.APP?[process.env.APP]:[path.join(base,'nodejs'),path.join(base,'public_html','nodejs')];const appDir=candidates.find((dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir));if(!appDir)process.exit(0);for(const name of ['images','videos'])fs.mkdirSync(path.join(persist,name),{recursive:true});for(const name of ['images','videos']){const link=path.join(appDir,name);fs.rmSync(link,{force:true,recursive:true});const target=path.join(persist,name);fs.symlinkSync(path.relative(appDir,target),link,process.platform==='win32'?'junction':'dir');}"
scripts.hostinger:symlinks: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const domain=process.env.DOMAIN||'construmaxpiscinas.com';const home=process.env.HOME||os.homedir();const base=process.env.BASE||path.join(home,'domains',domain);const persist=process.env.PERSIST||path.join(base,'storage','uploads');const candidates=process.env.APP?[process.env.APP]:[path.join(base,'nodejs'),path.join(base,'public_html','nodejs')];const appDir=candidates.find((dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir));if(!appDir)process.exit(0);for(const name of ['images','videos'])fs.mkdirSync(path.join(persist,name),{recursive:true});for(const name of ['images','videos']){const link=path.join(appDir,name);fs.rmSync(link,{force:true,recursive:true});const target=path.join(persist,name);fs.symlinkSync(path.relative(appDir,target),link,process.platform==='win32'?'junction':'dir');}"
